headline: Valero Energy Earnings To Skyrocket As Crack Spreads Soar Amid Iran War
summary: Valero earnings are expected to more than triple in Q1 with refining crack spreads surging amid the Iran war. Valero stock rose solidly.

headline: Venezuelan Crude Will Eventually Lower US Gas Prices: Chevron Exec
summary: Increased imports of Venezuelan crude by Chevron are helping ease price pressures at the margin, with potential longer-term relief as production expands.

headline: Is Chevron (CVX) Offering Value After A 10.8% Monthly Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Chevron's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what you are paying versus what you may be getting. Chevron recently closed at US$188.36, with a 1.3% return over the last 7 days, a 10.8% decline over 30 days, and gains of 20.8% year to date and 41.3% over the last year. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on large integrated energy companies, with investors regularly weighing factors...
